nodes.label: Abiel
nodes.description: The son of Zeror and father of Ner, who was the grandfather of Saul (1 Sam. 14:51; 1 Chr. 8:33; 9:39). In 1 Sam. 9:1, he is called the “father,” probably meaning the grandfather, of Kish.

nodes.label: Shimeah
nodes.description: A Benjamite, a descendant of Gibeon (1 Chr. 8:32); called also Shimeam (9:38).

nodes.label: Abdon
nodes.description: The first-born of Gibeon of the tribe of Benjamin (1 Chr. 8:30; 9:36).

nodes.label: Ahio
nodes.description: One of the sons of Jehiel the Gibeonite (1 Chr. 8:31; 9:37).

nodes.label: Baal
nodes.description: A Benjamite, son of Jehiel, the progenitor of the Gibeonites (1 Chr. 8:30; 9:36).

nodes.label: Kish
nodes.description: A Benjamite, the son of Abiel, and father of king Saul ( 1 Samuel 9:1 1 Samuel 9:3 ; 1 Samuel 10:11 1 Samuel 10:21 ; 14:51 ; 2 Sam 21:14 ). All that is recorded of him is that he sent his son Saul in search of his asses that had strayed, and that he was buried in Zelah. Called Cis, Acts 13:21 (RSV, Kish).

nodes.label: Ner
nodes.description: Light, the father of Kish (1 Chr. 8:33). 1 Sam. 14:51 should be read, “Kish, the father of Saul, and Ner, the father of Abner, were the sons of Abiel.” And hence this Kish and Ner were brothers, and Saul and Abner were first cousins (comp. 1 Chr. 9:36).

nodes.label: Zacher
nodes.description: Memorial, a son of Jehiel (1 Chr. 8:31; 9:35); called Zechariah (9:37).

verses.text: And Mikloth begat Shimeah. And these also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against them.
And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zechariah, and Mikloth.
And Mikloth begat Shimeam. And they also dwelt with their brethren at Jerusalem, over against their brethren.
